words.def: a principle or condition that customarily governs behavior
words.zh: n. 規則；條例（rule的複數形式）

words.def: a principle or condition that customarily governs behavior
words.zh: n. 規則, 統治, 控制, 支配, 規律, 標準, 章程, 破折號, 鉛線

words.def: having or feeling no doubt or uncertainty; confident and assured
words.zh: a. 確信, 必然的, 必定的
n. 使用, 習慣, 使用價值, 用法, 使用權
